title: Preducor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Preducors''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of large, quadrupedal creatures from the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. These beasts had a mane of razor-sharp hair and long spiked tails. Preducors often grew to be four meters tall, and could grow up to five meters in length. They were also nocturnal in nature.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Remnants of the Empire (adventure)|book=Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi (Second Edition)}}
